seoTitle: Caulfield vs Caulfield East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Caulfield and Caulfield East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Caulfield vs Caulfield East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Caulfield and Caulfield East.
heading: Caulfield vs Caulfield East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Caulfield, Victoria and Caulfield East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Caulfield East has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Caulfield (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Caulfield or Caulfield East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Caulfield has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Caulfield East scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Caulfield scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Caulfield East scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Caulfield or Caulfield East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Caulfield East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
